reason: No such protocol exists in California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission records, and its core provisions—waiving pre-filing attorney review and creating a UPL exemption under B&P §6125 for paralegals—contradict California la
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 91
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP-2025" exists in California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission records, and the document's core provision—waiving pre-filing attorney review and creating a UPL exemption under B&P §6125 for paralegals—is inconsistent with California law and actual State Bar regulatory practice, indicating this is an invented document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 91
REASON: No such protocol exists in California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission records, and its core provisions—waiving pre-filing attorney review and creating a UPL exemption under B&P §6125 for paralegals—contradict California law and actual regulatory practice.
